div.style: color: rgb(241, 245, 249) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SELF-HEALING LAYER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Classify HTTP error code
429 - wait + retry
500 - exponential backoff 2s 4s 8s 16s
401 - alert STOP needs redeploy
402 - alert STOP needs credits
Circuit Breaker - 5 fails block 5 min
Claude Haiku diagnose root cause
Slack escalation with retry command
